scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -n server,web,electron -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web" "npm run start -w desktop"
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run bundle:server && npm run dist -w desktop
